himpl_antisym.solution:
Lemma himpl_antisym : forall H1 H2,
  (H1 ==> H2) ->
  (H2 ==> H1) ->
  H1 = H2.
Proof using.
  introv M1 M2. apply hprop_eq. intros h. iff.
  { apply M1. }
  { apply M2. }
Qed.
himpl_antisym.explanation: Antisymmetry of entailment: if H1 ==> H2 and H2 ==> H1, then H1 = H2 by predicate extensionality.

qimpl_antisym.solution:
Lemma qimpl_antisym : forall Q1 Q2,
  (Q1 ===> Q2) ->
  (Q2 ===> Q1) ->
  Q1 = Q2.
Proof using.
  introv M1 M2. apply qprop_eq. intros v. apply himpl_antisym.
  { apply M1. }
  { apply M2. }
Qed.
qimpl_antisym.explanation: Antisymmetry of postcondition entailment follows from himpl_antisym applied pointwise.

himpl_hstar_hpure_r.explanation: To prove H ==> H' * [P], witness the split with h for H' and empty for [P], using that P holds.

himpl_hstar_hpure_l.solution:
Lemma himpl_hstar_hpure_l : forall (P:Prop) (H H':hprop),
  (P -> H ==> H') ->
  \[P] \* H ==> H'.
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h (h1&h2&(E1&HP)&M2&D&U). subst.
  rewrite Fmap.union_empty_l in U. subst.
  apply M. auto. auto.
Qed.
himpl_hstar_hpure_l.explanation: From [P] * H, extract P from the pure part (which is the empty heap), use P to get H ==> H', and apply to H h.

himpl_hexists_r.solution:
Lemma himpl_hexists_r : forall A (x:A) H J,
  H ==> J x ->
  H ==> (\exists x, J x).
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h Hh. exists x. apply M. auto.
Qed.
himpl_hexists_r.explanation: To prove H ==> exists x, J x, provide a witness x and use H ==> J x.

himpl_hexists_l.solution:
Lemma himpl_hexists_l : forall (A:Type) (H:hprop) (J:A->hprop),
  (forall x, J x ==> H) ->
  (\exists x, J x) ==> H.
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h (x&Hx). apply (M x). auto.
Qed.
himpl_hexists_l.explanation: To prove (exists x, J x) ==> H, destruct the existential and apply J x ==> H.

hexists_named_eq.explanation: Any H equals the existential quantification over H' with H'=H conjoined. Witness H' := H for forward; extract equality for backward.

himpl_example_1.solution:
Lemma himpl_example_1 : forall p1 p2 p3 p4,
  p1 ~~> 1 \* p2 ~~> 2 \* p3 ~~> 3 \* p4 ~~> 4
  ==> p4 ~~> 4 \* p1 ~~> 1 \* p2 ~~> 2 \* p3 ~~> 3.
Proof using. xsimpl. Qed.
himpl_example_1.explanation: Reorder separating conjunction. xsimpl handles the permutation automatically.

himpl_example_2.solution:
Lemma himpl_example_2 : forall p1 p2 p3 n,
  p1 ~~> 1 \* p2 ~~> 2 \* p3 ~~> n
  ==> p2 ~~> 2 \* \exists n, p3 ~~> n \* p1 ~~> 1.
Proof using. xsimpl. Qed.
himpl_example_2.explanation: Reorder and introduce an existential for n. xsimpl handles both.

himpl_example_3.solution:
Lemma himpl_example_3 : forall p,
  (\exists n, p ~~> n) ==> (\exists n, p ~~> (n + 1)).
Proof using.
  xsimpl. intros n. exists (n-1). fmap_eq.
Qed.
himpl_example_3.explanation: For any n, witness n-1 on the right side so that (n-1)+1 = n.

xchange_lemma.solution:
Lemma xchange_lemma : forall H1 H1' H H' H2,
  H1 ==> H1' ->
  H ==> H1 \* H2 ->
  H1' \* H2 ==> H' ->
  H ==> H'.
Proof using.
  introv M1 M2 M3. applys himpl_trans M2.
  applys himpl_trans. { applys himpl_frame_l M1. } { applys M3. }
Qed.
xchange_lemma.explanation: Chain entailments: split H into H1*H2, strengthen H1 to H1', then use H1'*H2 ==> H'.

himpl_frame_l.solution:
Lemma himpl_frame_l : forall H2 H1 H1',
  H1 ==> H1' ->
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2.
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h (h1&h2&M1&M2&D&U). exists h1 h2.
  splits. { apply M. auto. } { auto. } { auto. } { auto. }
Qed.
himpl_frame_l.explanation: Frame on the left: if H1 ==> H1', then H1 * H2 ==> H1' * H2 by applying M to h1.

himpl_frame_r.solution:
Lemma himpl_frame_r : forall H1 H2 H2',
  H2 ==> H2' ->
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1 \* H2'.
Proof using.
  introv M. intros h (h1&h2&M1&M2&D&U). exists h1 h2.
  splits. { auto. } { apply M. auto. } { auto. } { auto. }
Qed.
himpl_frame_r.explanation: Frame on the right: apply the entailment to the second component of the star.

himpl_frame_lr.solution:
Lemma himpl_frame_lr : forall H1 H1' H2 H2',
  H1 ==> H1' ->
  H2 ==> H2' ->
  H1 \* H2 ==> H1' \* H2'.
Proof using.
  introv M1 M2. applys himpl_trans.
  { applys himpl_frame_l M1. }
  { applys himpl_frame_r M2. }
Qed.
himpl_frame_lr.explanation: Frame both sides by composing left frame and right frame.
